heading: Termination
label: 9763 Termination
text: The requirement to impose sanctions under this chapter shall terminate on .December 31, 2023
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of div. J of , , , known as the Venezuela Emergency Relief, Democracy Assistance, and Development Act of 2019, and also as the VERDAD Act of 2019, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 116–94133 Stat. 3030section 9701 of this titleDec. 20, 2019
